channel.title: Mysql on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Mysql on Arrans github.io

item.title: Dokploy/dokploy
item.description: Open Source Alternative to Vercel, Netlify and Heroku.

item.title: pingcap/tidb
item.description: TiDB - the open-source, cloud-native, distributed SQL database designed for modern applications.

item.title: Maxteabag/sqlit
item.description: A user friendly TUI for SQL databases. Written in python. Supports SQL server, Mysql, PostreSQL, SQLite, Turso and more.

item.title: dbgate/dbgate
item.description: Database manager for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MongoDB, SQLite and others. Runs under Windows, Linux, Mac or as web application

item.title: chartdb/chartdb
item.description: Database diagrams editor that allows you to visualize and design your DB with a single query.

item.title: clidey/whodb
item.description: A lightweight next-gen data explorer - Postgres, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Redis, MariaDB, Elastic Search, and Clickhouse with Chat interface

item.title: dolthub/go-mysql-server
item.description: A MySQL-compatible relational database with a storage agnostic query engine. Implemented in Go.

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: David-Crty/databasement
item.description: Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

item.title: sqldef/sqldef
item.description: Idempotent schema management for MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, and SQL Server

item.title: dbeaver/dbeaver
item.description: Free universal database tool and SQL client

item.title: chartbrew/chartbrew
item.description: Open-source reporting platform to build and share live dashboards from APIs, SQL and NoSQL databases, with powerful AI assistant, scheduling, and embeddable charts 📈📊

item.title: RealOrangeOne/docker-db-auto-backup
item.description: A script to automatically back up all databases running under docker on a host

item.title: shieldproject/shield
item.description: A standalone system that can perform backup and restore functions for a wide variety of pluggable data systems
